title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Sapphire Foods India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Sapphire Foods India
jsonLd.description:
Sapphire Foods India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sapphire Foods India:
Sapphire Foods India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India!
